# Copilot Instructions: Bulgarian Car Marketplace (Bulgarski Mobili)

- **Stack & runtime**: React 18 + TypeScript (strict) + Styled-Components, CRACO (Webpack) for builds, Firebase (Auth/Firestore/Functions/Storage/FCM/Hosting), Algolia search, Stripe, Google Maps, Node >=18 (Functions use 20).
- **Immutable routing contract**: Numeric URLs only; never expose UUIDs. Patterns: `/profile/:numericId`, `/profile/:numericId/favorites`, `/car/:sellerNumericId/:carNumericId`, `/car/:sellerNumericId/:carNumericId/edit`, `/messages/:senderId/:recipientId`. See [docs/STRICT_NUMERIC_ID_SYSTEM.md](docs/STRICT_NUMERIC_ID_SYSTEM.md) and [src/routes/NumericProfileRouter.tsx](src/routes/NumericProfileRouter.tsx).
- **Data model**: Cars split across Firestore collections `passenger_cars`, `suvs`, `vans`, `motorcycles`, `trucks`, `buses`. Resolve names via `SellWorkflowCollections.getCollectionNameForVehicleType()`; never hardcode. `users` hold `numericId`; counters in `counters` drive ID assignment.
- **Core services (use, don’t duplicate)**: `UnifiedCarService` for create/update, `numeric-id-assignment.service.ts` + `numeric-car-system.service.ts` for IDs, `UnifiedSearchService` (+ `firestoreQueryBuilder`, `queryOrchestrator`, `multi-collection-helper`) for search, `sell-workflow-service.ts` orchestrates listing flow and returns numeric URLs, `bulgarian-profile-service.ts` enforces profile plans, `logger-service.ts` for logging, `error-handling-service.ts` for capture.
- **Profiles & plans**: Types in [src/types/user/bulgarian-user.types.ts](src/types/user/bulgarian-user.types.ts); limits checked via [src/utils/listing-limits.ts](src/utils/listing-limits.ts). Profile types managed by `ProfileTypeContext`.
- **State & providers**: Use context barrel [src/contexts/index.ts](src/contexts/index.ts) (`Auth`, `ProfileType`, `Language`, `Theme`, `Loading`, `Filter`). Avoid direct provider imports when barrel exists. No Redux.
- **Imports**: Use path aliases defined in tsconfig/craco/jest (e.g., `@/services/...`, `@/pages/...`). Keep configs in sync if adding aliases.
- **Routing & lazy loading**: Add routes in `src/routes/` (not AppRoutes). Use `safeLazy` from [src/utils/lazyImport.ts](src/utils/lazyImport.ts) for code-split pages to avoid runtime crashes.
- **Search & Algolia**: Keep config in [algolia-index-config.json](algolia-index-config.json) and template in [algolia-record-template.json](algolia-record-template.json). Sync via `npm run sync-algolia` or `SYNC_ALGOLIA_NOW.bat`. Pass arrays (not strings) for Algolia attribute lists.
- **Logging rule**: `console.log/error` banned in `src/` (enforced by `scripts/ban-console.js` during `npm run prebuild`). Use `logger` service; only `logger-service.ts` may touch console.
- **Key workflows**: Car creation must call `UnifiedCarService.createCarListing()` to assign numeric IDs and enforce limits. Favorites, messaging, notifications rely on numeric IDs—never bypass resolution helpers. Firestore listeners follow cleanup patterns in [FIRESTORE_LISTENERS_FIX.md](FIRESTORE_LISTENERS_FIX.md).
- **Testing**: Jest + RTL (`npm test`, `npm run test:ci`). Mocks in [src/**mocks**/firebase/firebase-config.ts](src/__mocks__/firebase/firebase-config.ts); d3 mocked. Test globs: `src/**/__tests__/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}`, `src/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}`, `src/**/*.spec.{ts,tsx}`.
- **Build & dev**: `npm start` (CRACO dev), `npm run start:dev` (4GB, no auto-open), `npm run type-check`, `npm run build` (runs ban-console), `npm run build:analyze`, `npm run build:optimized`. Cache is memory-only; dev server sends no-cache headers.
- **Deployment**: `npm run deploy` / `deploy:hosting` / `deploy:functions`; Functions code in [functions/src](functions/src). Node 20, CORS+Auth enforced. Before deploy run `npm run check-security` and ensure env vars present (`.env.local` not committed).
- **Utilities**: `npm run clean:3000`, `clean:cache`, `clean:all` for stuck ports/cache; `scripts/clear-dev-caches.ps1` helper. Data scripts in `scripts/` (migrate-isActive, backup-manager, check-firestore-data). Image optimization via `node scripts/optimize-images.js`.
- **Performance**: Prefer WebP assets; use `useCallback`/`useMemo` on heavy lists (see ConversationsList). Use `LightweightLoadingOverlay` or `LoadingContext` for loading states.
- **Localization**: All UI text via `useLanguage`; update both locales in `src/locales/bg` and `src/locales/en`. Key namespaces: common/auth/advancedSearch/carDetails/profile.
- **Stripe**: Checkout sessions live under `customers/{uid}/checkout_sessions`; rules enforce UID match.
- **Bulgarian market defaults**: EUR pricing, `+359` phone, cities from `bulgaria-locations.service.ts`; comply with EGN/EIK validation services.
- **Docs worth skimming**: [PROJECT_CONSTITUTION.md](PROJECT_CONSTITUTION.md) (immutable rules), [docs/STRICT_NUMERIC_ID_SYSTEM.md](docs/STRICT_NUMERIC_ID_SYSTEM.md), [PROJECT_COMPLETE_INVENTORY.md](PROJECT_COMPLETE_INVENTORY.md), [FIRESTORE_LISTENERS_FIX.md](FIRESTORE_LISTENERS_FIX.md), [SEARCH_SYSTEM.md](SEARCH_SYSTEM.md), [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md), [DEPLOYMENT_SUCCESS_REPORT_DEC28_2025.md](DEPLOYMENT_SUCCESS_REPORT_DEC28_2025.md).

If anything here is unclear or missing, tell me which area to expand (routes, services, build/test, search, or localization).
